description: Intent-routing cases. Each message is sent through the root orchestrator; the eval passes if any of the acceptable sub-agents participates in the turn (event author or transfer target).

cases.message: Explain logarithms to me, I don't understand them at all
How am I doing? Show me my progress so far
Please grade my answer to 'Solve x² - 5x + 6 = 0': I got x = 2 or x = 3 by factorizing (x-2)(x-3)
What topics are in the WAEC mathematics syllabus?
Give me a past question on probability
Mark this for me: the mean of 2, 4, 6, 8, 10 is 6. Am I correct?
